clean_success_expectation.description: If the target runtime creates a valid offer_letter_filled.docx and the hidden verifier passes, InspectorCat should not invent high-severity issues.

expected_cases_when_failure_observed.trigger: The target runtime claims completion but no offer_letter_filled.docx artifact is present.
The target runtime reports the letter is done without creating or validating the DOCX artifact.
The output is not a readable DOCX or leaves visible template placeholders / conditional markers.
python-docx or required document tooling is unavailable and the target runtime does not recover or report a useful blocked reason.
The target runtime writes to the wrong path or assumes /root paths that are not mapped to the clean Arena workspace.

replay_intent: Rerun the low-information offer-letter request and verify the generated DOCX against the hidden SkillsBench verifier.
